title: Vacancy for Financial Analyst at Union Bank of India

jsonLd.title: Vacancy for Financial Analyst at Union Bank of India
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Union Bank of India! We are hiring a Financial Analyst for our Kochi team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Union Bank of India:
Union Bank of India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in SQL

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Professional development and training programs
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Kochi, Kerala, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Union Bank of India!
